title: Enchantment Requirements
body:
A utility mod for seeing some information that's usually not presented to the user.

Adds tooltips for various enchanting values, such as the current power of the enchantment table, the enchantability of items, the enchantment power of blocks, and the cost for individual enchanted books.

Cyan text only available when an enchantment table is open.

True cost depends on the item being enchanted.



# Item enchantability

![Enchantment table with a golden how and a tooltip showing enchantment value: 22](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/687ddae41780087fc2b35ed1d6280310ad99f1b2.png)

# Block enchanting power

![Bookshelf with enchantment power: 1.0 tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38731b1d4451b26f7c315afd936d942b9a4bd71b.png)

# Cost for individual enchantments

![Fire Protection I with tooltip saying Enchantment cost: 10 - 18](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69bc3837ce687451a46c147bea5e571b93cd4f9a.png)
